title: QuickChat
description: Adds chat emotes and emoji's into Minecraft. ᕦ(ò_óˇ)ᕤ
body:
Have you ever wanted to quickly type (╯°□°)╯︵ ┻━┻ into chat after dying? Then QuickChat is the mod for you! Simply type /tableflip and your dreams will come true. QuickChat is a client side mod that adds a whole ton of custom chat commands into Minecraft. It also allows you to add your own QuickChats.
  • /quickchat help for all currently registered QuickChats
  • /quickchat add to add a new QuickChat
  • /quickchat remove to remove a QuickChat
Add your own emoji's and chat emotes!
*** Updating my mods to keep working with every Minecraft update takes time. Consider donating ☕💪 ***
